fund_types.name: CIP Spark
individual_eligibility: Minimum 2 individuals in a team (at least 1 Malaysian)
Minimum 1 individual residing in Malaysia (Malaysian or non-Malaysian)
company_eligibility: For less than 51% Malaysian ownership, majority employees must be Malaysian
Must have IP rights or valid licensed IP arrangement
No other company/entity with 25% or more shareholding
fund_types.fund_utilisation_rule: At least 60% for developmental expenses and up to 40% for non-developmental/commercialisation expenses.
fund_types.disbursement_method: Advance payment and reimbursement, subject to milestones.
deliverables: Functional prototype or MVP by end of funding
fund_types.application_process_note: Typical timeline after pitching is around 2 to 4 months, subject to complete documentation.

fund_types.name: CIP Sprint
applicant_type: Sdn Bhd (including SMEs, university spin-offs, research institute spin-offs)
company_eligibility: Minimum 2 directors, with at least 1 Malaysian and at least 1 residing in Malaysia
For less than 51% Malaysian ownership, majority employees must be Malaysian
Must have IP rights or valid licensed IP arrangement
No other company/entity with 25% or more shareholding
fund_types.fund_utilisation_rule: At least 60% for commercialisation expenses and up to 40% for product development/enhancement and other expenses.
fund_types.disbursement_method: Advance payment and reimbursement, subject to milestone deliverables.
fund_types.application_process_note: Typical timeline after pitching is around 2 to 4 months, subject to complete documentation.
fund_types.traction_note: Commercial traction data can strengthen application; recipients are expected to meet traction/revenue milestones during funding.

contact.address: Level 20, Sunway Putra Tower, 100 Jalan Putra, 50350 Kuala Lumpur
